data.label: UC 内核
data.description: The UC Kernel is UC’s self-developed mobile browser engine, the same as the latest UC Browser version. It offers powerful WebView capabilities for a smooth H5 experience. With its lightweight SDK, stable performance, and complete features, partners can quickly integrate the UC Browser engine to deliver a more stable, secure, and smooth browsing experience in their apps.

data.label: UC 内核
data.description: UC 内核内核是 UC 自研，并与最新 UC 浏览器同款的移动浏览器内核，其具有强大的 webview 能力，让用户获得畅快的 H5 体验。轻量的接入 SDK、稳定的性能以及完备的功能，让合作伙伴在快速嵌入 UC 浏览器内核后，为 app 获得更稳定、更安全、更顺畅的浏览体验。
